response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Confirmed that there are no vocal tracks, dialogue, or lyrics in the video, which is purely instrumental background music. 2. JSON Usage: Relied on the reference JSON to confirm the absence of vocals and used the on-screen text exception to translate and subtitle prominent visual event slides. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitled the central, prominent announcement slides ('The concert will be starting soon', 'Attention For Visitors', and '2nd Round of Concert Merch Sales') exactly for the duration they appear on screen. The scattered fan messages collage was excluded to prevent screen clutter.
